title: pediomelum subulatum
intro: Pediomelum subulatum, also known as antelope sage or green rabbitbrush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pediomelum subulatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Pediomelum subulatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote wound healing and support overall well-being.
